import io
import string
import list

let content = io.read_to_end()
let lines = string.split(content, "\n")
let n = list.len(lines)
mut i = 0
let last_empty = if n > 0
  match lines.get(n - 1)
  when Some(s)
    string.is_empty(s)
  when None
    false
  end
else
  false
end
let limit = if last_empty
  n - 1
else
  n
end
while i < limit
  match lines.get(i)
  when Some(s)
    println("[#{i}] #{s}")
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
